message:
feat(tools): enrich reservation JSON responses with project and created_ts fields

- Add "project" field (human_key) to reservation JSON in
  file_reservation_paths, release, renew, force_release, and ack_ttl
  escalation responses for easier cross-project debugging.
- Add "created_ts" to ack_ttl escalation payloads.
- Extend `path_looks_absolute` to recognize tilde-prefixed paths
  ("~/..." and bare "~") so they are rejected as invalid reservation
  patterns before reaching the database.
- Update `reservation_response_serializes` test to cover the conflict
  branch (ConflictHolder with agent name) instead of the granted branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
